End-to-end machine learning framework for diabetes prediction. Leverages Local Outlier Factor (LOF) for anomaly detection and 10-fold cross-validation for model selection. Features an optimized ensemble of LightGBM and Gradient Boosting tuned via GridSearchCV for maximum sensitivity.

brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".

TERV is an advanced Machine Learning validation and comparison framework designed to build, evaluate, and explain multiple classification models in a transparent and interpretable way. Course project for the Machine Learning (Advanced) class at CEU.
